tags.name: mc-calendar-month-year-picker
tags.description:
Events:

  * `closed` {`CustomEvent<{ value: MonthYearPickerValue; }>`} - 

  * `monthyearselected` {`CustomEvent<{ value: any; }>`} - 

  * `focusout` {`CustomEvent<unknown>`} - 

Attributes:

  * `open` {`boolean`} - 

  * `value` {`MonthYearPickerValue`} - Initial value of the picker

  * `min` - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `max` - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render in month-year picker.

Properties:

  * `internalValue` {`MonthYearPickerValue`} - 

  * `open` {`boolean`} - 

  * `rootContainer` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - 

  * `monthYearPicker` - 

  * `confirmButton` - 

  * `value` {`MonthYearPickerValue`} - Initial value of the picker

  * `min` - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `max` - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render in month-year picker.

tags.name: `mc-calendar`
tags.description:
A calendar component that allows users to select dates and view date-related information.
Category: Forms, Actions
Purpose: Display calendar interface for date selection and navigation.
When to use: Date selection, Scheduling, Booking systems
When not to use: Displaying static dates, Non-interactive date views
Works with components: mc-card, mc-drawer, mc-input-date, mc-modal, mc-popover
Alternative component names: Date Picker, Date Selector, Calendar Widget

Events:

  * `dateselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when the date is selected.

Slots:

  * ``footer`` {} - Footer slot.

Attributes:

  * `customstyles` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `format` {`string`} - 

  * `activedate` {`string | null`} - Specifies which year and month to display. Can be used to switch between months/years without selecting a date.
If left blank, today's month and year is used by default.

  * `locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

  * `dayperiod` {`"long" | "short" | "narrow"`} - Format for displaying weekday names in the calendar header.

  * `value` {`string`} - Selected date value, defaults to current date (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `previouslabel` {`string`} - An aria-label to use for the previous month navigation button.

  * `nextlabel` {`string`} - An aria-label to use for the next month navigation button.

  * `customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - A set of dates to customize. Use to display day indicators or
disable selectable days within selectable date range if min and max are specified.
Check the Storybook examples for more details.

  * `min` - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `max` - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `startofweek` {`number`} - Start of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ...)

  * `showadjacentmonthdays` {`boolean`} - Whether to render days from the previous and next month.

  * `showweeknumbers` {`boolean`} - Whether to render week numbers.

  * `noshadow` {`boolean`} - Whether to disable shadow.

  * `noborder` {`boolean`} - Whether to disable borders.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render in month-year picker.

Properties:

  * `customstyles` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `format` {`string`} - 

  * `_customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - 

  * `_max` - 

  * `_min` - 

  * `hasFooterSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `activeDate` - 

  * `cachedWeekdays` {`Map<string, Weekday[]>`} - 

  * `cachedWeeks` {`Map<string, Week[]>`} - 

  * `firstDayOfWeek` {`number`} - 

  * `firstWeekOffset` {`number`} - 

  * `focusableDate` - 

  * `periodButtonText` {`string`} - 

  * `selectedDate` - 

  * `todayValue` - 

  * `weekdays` {`Weekday[] | undefined`} - 

  * `showMonthYearPicker` {`boolean`} - 

  * `weeks` {`Week[] | undefined`} - 

  * `eventReferences` {`{ onKeyUp?: ((event: KeyboardEvent) => Promise<void>) | undefined; onKeyDown?: ((event: KeyboardEvent) => void) | undefined; } | undefined`} - 

  * `flattenedWeeks` {`CalendarCell[]`} - 

  * `previousButtonElement` - 

  * `nextButtonElement` - 

  * `monthYearPicker` - 

  * `currentPeriodElement` - 

  * `activedate` {`string | null`} - Specifies which year and month to display. Can be used to switch between months/years without selecting a date.
If left blank, today's month and year is used by default.

  * `locale` {`string`} - Locale to render the month/day names in.
By default the component will use the users browser language.
Defaults to `en-GB` if fetching browser languge fails.

  * `dayperiod` {`"long" | "short" | "narrow"`} - Format for displaying weekday names in the calendar header.

  * `value` {`string`} - Selected date value, defaults to current date (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `previouslabel` {`string`} - An aria-label to use for the previous month navigation button.

  * `nextlabel` {`string`} - An aria-label to use for the next month navigation button.

  * `customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - A set of dates to customize. Use to display day indicators or
disable selectable days within selectable date range if min and max are specified.
Check the Storybook examples for more details.

  * `min` - Define minimal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `max` - Define maximal selectable date, unlimited if empty (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD)

  * `startofweek` {`number`} - Start of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ...)

  * `showadjacentmonthdays` {`boolean`} - Whether to render days from the previous and next month.

  * `showweeknumbers` {`boolean`} - Whether to render week numbers.

  * `noshadow` {`boolean`} - Whether to disable shadow.

  * `noborder` {`boolean`} - Whether to disable borders.

  * `yearcap` {`number`} - How many years backwards and forwards from the current one to render in month-year picker.

  * `dateselected` - Emitted when the date was selected
